_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ensure risk management responsibilities are clearly defined, assigned, and communicated to relevant stakeholders.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-007 (RM, cosine: 0.599), DG-K-002 (DG, cosine: 0.548).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.392). Shared vocabulary: [management, risk]. DCWF-only terms [assigned, clearly, communicated, defined, ensure, relevant] vs WIDAI-only terms [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.889 (P=0.896, R=0.882). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Ensure risk management responsibilities are clearly defined, assigned, and commu" and "Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.638 > STS 0.392 (gap +0.246). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [management, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [management, risk]. DCWF-only: [assigned, clearly, communicated, defined, ensure, relevant]. WIDAI-only: [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception].
